title: 7 Habits of Highly Effective People
html:
A classic piece of self-help book by Stephen Covey . I have a bit of back-off feeling with this book. The advice sounds generic and cliche.

Q: What is the habit #1? A: Proactive

Q: What is the habit #2? A: Start with the end in mind

backlinks.title: § On top of mind
backlinks.context: 7 Habits of Highly Effective People Read this out of curisoty, I wonder what makes it become a so of a classic.
